title: Paru Parvathy
overview: Paru Parvathy is a Kannada road movie about a solo traveler named Payal. The film explores themes of self-discovery, relationships, and emotions. It was shot in multiple locations, including Bengaluru, Goa, Maharashtra, Rajasthan, and Uttarakhand.
